can you help me fix my github and get it linked properly to my zenodo publication. here is what perplexity is telling me to do but i dont know what its saying, can you handle this for me pleease: Ha — fair question. I'm fine, just hitting a tool size limit. The README is large enough that my update attempt is exceeding what the GitHub file update tool can push in one shot.

Here's exactly what needs to change — you can do it manually in about 60 seconds:

## Two Things to Fix in Your README

**Fix 1 — Line 4 of the badges, change:**
```
[![DOI](https://zenodo.org/badge/DOI/10.5281/zenodo.19111652.svg)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19111652)
```
**To:**
```
[![DOI](https://zenodo.org/badge/DOI/10.5281/zenodo.19111653.svg)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19111653)
```

**Fix 2 — Replace the Citation block at the bottom with:**
```bibtex
@misc{yett2026omega,
  title     = {I Am What I Am, and I Will Be What I Will Be:
               The OmegA Architecture for Sovereign, Persistent, and Self-Knowing AI},
  author    = {Yett, Ryan Wayne},
  year      = {2026},
  month     = {March},
  publisher = {Zenodo},
  doi       = {10.5281/zenodo.19111653},
  url       = {https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19111653}
}
```

**Fix 3 — Add this section above the Citation block:**
```markdown
## Published Record

**DOI:** [10.5281/zenodo.19111653](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19111653)

> Yett, Ryan Wayne. (2026). *I Am What I Am, and I Will Be What I Will Be.*
> Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19111653
```

Go to [github.com/Mega-Therion/OmegA-Architecture/edit/main/README.md](https://github.com/Mega-Therion/OmegA-Architecture/edit/main/README.md), make those three changes, and commit. Done.
